name: pyfluids

metadata.name: pyfluids
metadata.summary: Simple, full-featured, lightweight CoolProp wrapper for Python

documentation:
# ![PyFluids](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/portyanikhin/PyFluids/main/pictures/header.png)

[![Build & Tests](https://github.com/portyanikhin/PyFluids/actions/workflows/build-tests.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/portyanikhin/PyFluids/actions/workflows/build-tests.yml)
[![CodeQL](https://github.com/portyanikhin/PyFluids/actions/workflows/codeql-analysis.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/portyanikhin/PyFluids/actions/workflows/codeql-analysis.yml)
[![PyPI](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/pyfluids)](https://pypi.org/project/pyfluids/)
[![Python](https://img.shields.io/pypi/pyversions/pyfluids)](https://pypi.org/project/pyfluids/)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/portyanikhin/PyFluids)](https://github.com/portyanikhin/PyFluids/blob/master/LICENSE)
[![codecov](https://codecov.io/gh/portyanikhin/PyFluids/branch/main/graph/badge.svg?token=I1LL66AOJW)](https://codecov.io/gh/portyanikhin/PyFluids)
[![Code style: black](https://img.shields.io/badge/code%20style-black-black)](https://github.com/psf/black)

Simple, full-featured, lightweight [CoolProp](http://www.coolprop.org) wrapper for Python.

_**See [full documentation](https://github.com/portyanikhin/PyFluids).**_

Input value in SI units.
```

classes.name: pyfluids.fluids.mixture.Mixture

methods.name: pyfluids.fluids.mixture.Mixture.__init__
documentation:
Mass-based mixture of pure fluids.

```
param fluids

List of selected names of pure fluids.

param fractions

List of mass-based fractions
[by default, %; you can change this using the configuration file].

If fluids or fractions are invalid.
```

classes.name: pyfluids.io.input_humid_air.InputHumidAir

methods.name: pyfluids.io.input_humid_air.InputHumidAir.__init__
documentation:
CoolProp keyed input for humid air.

```
param coolprop_key

CoolProp internal key.

param value

Input value in SI units.
```

methods.name: pyfluids.io.input_humid_air.InputHumidAir.altitude
documentation:
Altitude above sea level.

The pressure will be calculated by altitude above sea level according to
ASHRAE Fundamentals Handbook.

```
param value

The value of the input [m].

return

Altitude above sea level for the input.

raises ValueError

If altitude above sea level is not between
-5000 and 11000 meters.
```

methods.name: pyfluids.io.input_humid_air.InputHumidAir.density
documentation:

```

return

```

classes.name: pyfluids.fluids.fluid.Fluid

methods.name: pyfluids.fluids.fluid.Fluid.__init__
documentation:
Pure/pseudo-pure fluid or binary mixture.

```
param name

Selected fluid name.

param fraction

Mass-based or volume-based fraction for binary mixtures
[by default, %; you can change this using the configuration file].

raises ValueError

If fraction is invalid.
```

documentation: Selected fluid name.

documentation:
Mass-based or volume-based fraction for binary mixtures

classes.name: pyfluids.config.pyfluids_config_builder.PyFluidsConfigBuilder

documentation: PyFluids configuration builder.

methods.name: pyfluids.config.pyfluids_config_builder.PyFluidsConfigBuilder.build
documentation:
Build PyFluids configuration.

If the configuration file is not found or an incorrect
configuration is found in the files "pyproject.toml" or "tox.ini",
returns the default configuration.

```
raises ValueError

If configuration file is invalid.
```
PyFluids configuration builder.
noinspection PyBroadException

methods.name: pyfluids.enums.fluids_list.FluidsList.fraction_min
documentation:
Minimum possible fraction
[by default, %; you can change this using the configuration file].

methods.name: pyfluids.enums.fluids_list.FluidsList.fraction_max
documentation:
Maximum possible fraction
[by default, %; you can change this using the configuration file].

List of CoolProp fluids.

See more info about CoolProp `pure and pseudo-pure fluids
<http://www.coolprop.org/fluid_properties/PurePseudoPure.html>`_,
`incompressible fluids
<http://www.coolprop.org/fluid_properties/Incompressibles.html>`_
and `predefined mixtures
<http://www.coolprop.org/coolprop/HighLevelAPI.html#predefined-mixtures>`_.

documentation: Performs deep (full) copy of the fluid instance.

methods.name: pyfluids.fluids.abstract_fluid.AbstractFluid.with_state
documentation:
Returns a new fluid instance with a defined state.

```
param first_input

First input property.

param second_input

Second input property.

return

A new fluid instance with a defined state.

raises ValueError

If input is invalid.
```

methods.name: pyfluids.fluids.abstract_fluid.AbstractFluid.update
documentation:
Updates the state of the fluid.

```
param first_input

First input property.

param second_input

Second input property.

raises ValueError

If input is invalid.
```

methods.name: pyfluids.fluids.abstract_fluid.AbstractFluid.reset
documentation: Resets all non-trivial properties.
noinspection DuplicatedCode

methods.name: pyfluids.fluids.abstract_fluid.AbstractFluid.specify_phase
documentation:
Specify the phase state for all further calculations.

```
param phase

Phase state.

return

Current fluid instance.
```

methods.name: pyfluids.fluids.abstract_fluid.AbstractFluid.unspecify_phase
documentation:
Unspecify the phase state and go back to calculating it based on the inputs.

```
return

Current fluid instance.
```

methods.name: pyfluids.fluids.abstract_fluid.AbstractFluid.isentropic_compression_to_pressure
documentation:
The process of isentropic compression to given pressure.

```
param pressure

Absolute pressure [Pa].

return

The state of the fluid at the end of the process.

raises ValueError

If pressure is invalid.
```

methods.name: pyfluids.fluids.abstract_fluid.AbstractFluid.compression_to_pressure
documentation:
The process of compression to given pressure.

```
param pressure

Absolute pressure [Pa].

param isentropic_efficiency

Compressor isentropic efficiency
[by default, %; you can change this using the configuration file].

return

The state of the fluid at the end of the process.

raises ValueError

If pressure or isentropic efficiency is invalid.
```

methods.name: pyfluids.fluids.abstract_fluid.AbstractFluid.isenthalpic_expansion_to_pressure
documentation:
The process of isenthalpic expansion to given pressure.

```
param pressure

Absolute pressure [Pa].

return

The state of the fluid at the end of the process.

raises ValueError

If pressure is invalid.
```

methods.name: pyfluids.fluids.abstract_fluid.AbstractFluid.isentropic_expansion_to_pressure
documentation:
The process of isentropic expansion to given pressure.

```
param pressure

Absolute pressure [Pa].

return

The state of the fluid at the end of the process.

raises ValueError

If pressure is invalid.
```

methods.name: pyfluids.fluids.abstract_fluid.AbstractFluid.expansion_to_pressure
documentation:
The process of expansion to given pressure.

```
param pressure

Absolute pressure [Pa].

param isentropic_efficiency

Expander isentropic efficiency
[by default, %; you can change this using the configuration file].

return

The state of the fluid at the end of the process.

raises ValueError

If pressure or isentropic efficiency is invalid.
```

methods.name: pyfluids.fluids.abstract_fluid.AbstractFluid.cooling_to_temperature
documentation:
The process of cooling to given temperature.

```
param temperature

Temperature
[by default, °C; you can change this using the configuration file].

param pressure_drop

Pressure drop in the heat exchanger (optional) [Pa].

return

The state of the fluid at the end of the process.

raises ValueError

If temperature or pressure drop is invalid.
```

methods.name: pyfluids.fluids.abstract_fluid.AbstractFluid.cooling_to_enthalpy
documentation:
The process of cooling to given enthalpy.

```
param enthalpy

Enthalpy [J/kg].

param pressure_drop

Pressure drop in the heat exchanger (optional) [Pa].

return

The state of the fluid at the end of the process.

raises ValueError

If enthalpy or pressure drop is invalid.
```

documentation:

```
param temperature

Temperature
[by default, °C; you can change this using the configuration file].

param pressure_drop

Pressure drop in the heat exchanger (optional) [Pa].

return

The state of the fluid at the end of the process.

raises ValueError

If temperature or pressure drop is invalid.
```

param enthalpy

Enthalpy [J/kg].

Pressure drop in the heat exchanger (optional) [Pa].

The state of the fluid at the end of the process.

If enthalpy or pressure drop is invalid.

methods.name: pyfluids.fluids.abstract_fluid.AbstractFluid.mixing
documentation:
The mixing process.

```
param first_specific_mass_flow

Specific mass flow rate of the fluid
at the first state [-].

param first

Fluid at the first state.

param second_specific_mass_flow

Specific mass flow rate of the fluid
at the second state [-].

param second

Fluid at the second state.

return

The state of the fluid at the end of the process.

raises ValueError

If the mixing process is not possible.
```

methods.name: pyfluids.fluids.abstract_fluid.AbstractFluid.as_json
documentation:

True if indented.

return

The fluid instance as a JSON string.
```

methods.name: pyfluids.humid_air.humid_air.HumidAir.clone
documentation: Performs deep (full) copy of the humid air instance.

methods.name: pyfluids.humid_air.humid_air.HumidAir.with_state
documentation:
Returns a new humid air instance with a defined state.

```
param first_input

First input property.

param second_input

Second input property.

param third_input

Third input property.

return

A new humid air instance with a defined state.

raises ValueError

If input is invalid.
```

methods.name: pyfluids.humid_air.humid_air.HumidAir.update
documentation:
Updates the state of the humid air.

```
param first_input

First input property.

param second_input

Second input property.

param third_input

Third input property.

raises ValueError

If input is invalid.
```

methods.name: pyfluids.humid_air.humid_air.HumidAir.reset
documentation: Resets all properties.
noinspection DuplicatedCode

methods.name: pyfluids.humid_air.humid_air.HumidAir.dry_cooling_to_temperature
documentation:
The process of cooling without dehumidification to given temperature.

```
param temperature

Temperature
[by default, °C; you can change this using the configuration file].

param pressure_drop

Pressure drop in the heat exchanger (optional) [Pa].

return

The state of the humid air at the end of the process.

raises ValueError

If temperature or pressure drop is invalid.
```

methods.name: pyfluids.humid_air.humid_air.HumidAir.dry_cooling_to_enthalpy
documentation:
The process of cooling without dehumidification to given enthalpy.

```
param enthalpy

Enthalpy [J/kg].

param pressure_drop

Pressure drop in the heat exchanger (optional) [Pa].

return

The state of the humid air at the end of the process.

raises ValueError

If enthalpy or pressure drop is invalid.
```

methods.name: pyfluids.humid_air.humid_air.HumidAir.wet_cooling_to_temperature_and_relative_humidity
documentation:
The process of cooling with dehumidification
to given temperature and relative humidity ratio.

```
param temperature

Temperature
[by default, °C; you can change this using the configuration file].

param relative_humidity

Relative humidity ratio
[by default, %; you can change this using the configuration file].

param pressure_drop

Pressure drop in the heat exchanger (optional) [Pa].

return

The state of the humid air at the end of the process.

raises ValueError

If temperature, relative humidity ratio or
pressure drop is invalid.
```

methods.name: pyfluids.humid_air.humid_air.HumidAir.wet_cooling_to_temperature_and_absolute_humidity
documentation:
The process of cooling with dehumidification
to given temperature and absolute humidity ratio.

```
param temperature

Temperature
[by default, °C; you can change this using the configuration file].

param humidity

Absolute humidity ratio [kg/kg d.a.].

param pressure_drop

Pressure drop in the heat exchanger (optional) [Pa].

return

The state of the humid air at the end of the process.

raises ValueError

If temperature, absolute humidity ratio or
pressure drop is invalid.
```

documentation:

to given enthalpy and relative humidity ratio.

```
param enthalpy

Enthalpy [J/kg].

param relative_humidity

Relative humidity ratio
[by default, %; you can change this using the configuration file].

param pressure_drop

Pressure drop in the heat exchanger (optional) [Pa].

return

The state of the humid air at the end of the process.

raises ValueError

If enthalpy, relative humidity ratio or
pressure drop is invalid.
```

methods.name: pyfluids.humid_air.humid_air.HumidAir.wet_cooling_to_enthalpy_and_absolute_humidity
documentation:
The process of cooling with dehumidification
to given enthalpy and absolute humidity ratio.

```
param enthalpy

Enthalpy [J/kg].

param humidity

Absolute humidity ratio [kg/kg d.a.].

param pressure_drop

Pressure drop in the heat exchanger (optional) [Pa].

The state of the humid air at the end of the process.

If enthalpy, absolute humidity ratio or

```

methods.name: pyfluids.humid_air.humid_air.HumidAir.heating_to_temperature
documentation:
The process of heating to given temperature.

param temperature

Temperature
[by default, °C; you can change this using the configuration file].

Pressure drop in the heat exchanger (optional) [Pa].

documentation:

param relative_humidity

Relative humidity ratio
[by default, %; you can change this using the configuration file].

return

The state of the humid air at the end of the process.

raises ValueError

documentation:
The process of humidification by water (isenthalpic)
to given absolute humidity ratio.

param humidity

Absolute humidity ratio [kg/kg d.a.].

return

The state of the humid air at the end of the process.

raises ValueError

If absolute humidity ratio is invalid.

methods.name: pyfluids.humid_air.humid_air.HumidAir.humidification_by_steam_to_relative_humidity
documentation:
The process of humidification by steam (isothermal)

param relative_humidity

Relative humidity ratio
[by default, %; you can change this using the configuration file].

return

The state of the humid air at the end of the process.

raises ValueError

methods.name: pyfluids.humid_air.humid_air.HumidAir.humidification_by_steam_to_absolute_humidity

methods.name: pyfluids.humid_air.humid_air.HumidAir.mixing
documentation:
The mixing process.

```
param first_specific_mass_flow

Specific mass flow rate of the humid air
at the first state [-].

param first

Humid air at the first state.

param second_specific_mass_flow

Specific mass flow rate of the humid air
the second state [-].

param second

Humid air at the second state.

return

The state of the humid air at the end of the process.

raises ValueError

If the mixing process is not possible.
```

methods.name: pyfluids.humid_air.humid_air.HumidAir.as_json
documentation:
Converts the humid air instance to a JSON string.

```
param indented

True if indented.

return

The humid air instance as a JSON string.
```

methods.name: pyfluids.humid_air.humid_air.HumidAir.as_dict
documentation: Converts the humid air to a dict.
Real humid air (see ASHRAE RP-1485).
